_comment: The scripted 90-second first-run. Runs once ever, gated by the `wildkin-onboarded` localStorage flag. `affinityThreshold` here OVERRIDES the normal creatures.json threshold during onboarding — it is THE most important tuning number in the build: with affinityPerTick 10 and a ~2s harvest tick, 30 affinity = 3 resonant harvests ≈ 6-8 seconds of work, putting the first evolution well under 90 seconds including reading time. `freeDecor` is handed to the player at step 1 at zero cost. Prompt texts are shown in the guide panel in order.

prompts.place: 🔥 Place the Forge on the glowing tile
prompts.assign: 👆 Tap Cindling, then tap the glowing tree beside the Forge
prompts.working: ✨ Resonance! Cindling is changing… watch the bar above it
prompts.done: 🌱 Your sanctuary grows — two new wildkin have arrived. Steer them with decor!
